defs: By name; by particular mention; specifically; especially; expressly.
quotes: The solitariness of man . . . God hath namely and principally ordered to prevent by marriage.

defs: That is to say; to wit; videlicet; -- introducing a particular or specific designation.
quotes: For the excellency of the soul, namely, its power of divining dreams; that several such divinations have been made, none can question.
